title: Admin Cheat Book
description: a craftable item that only admin can use
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/XhGhsg1QQAA" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>I recommend to activate cheat to allow the command in the book to work.
This data pack add a use to the dragon egg, 4 nether stars and 4 netherite block to craft the Admin Cheat Book that give overpower item and tool.
We can or not use the orbital strike datapack for 
1.21.1 / 1.20.1 https://modrinth.com/datapack/osc-dp
1.21.11 https://modrinth.com/datapack/orbital-strike-cannon-datapack

Only work in forge and Neoforge, I'm not sure for fabric and quilt
